---
title: "test_diag_engine.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\quarantine\test_diag_engine.py"
loc: 12
complexity: 1
logic_score: 4.15
style_score: 4.43
intel_score: 8.07
overall_score: 5.43
---

## Intent
The `test_diag_engine.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on test_run_diag_logic, MockEngine, __init__, load_core_skills, load_skills_from_dir, build_index, search. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via test_run_diag_logic, MockEngine, __init__, load_core_skills, load_skills_from_dir, build_index, search. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.1/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.4/10
- **Intel [I]**: 8.1/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 4 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [src.tools.debug.diag_engine](file://src.tools.debug.diag_engine)

### Exports
- `test_run_diag_logic`
- `MockEngine`
- `__init__`
- `load_core_skills`
- `load_skills_from_dir`
- `build_index`
- `search`
